description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a short, sawed-off design, featuring two parallel barrels aligned side-by-side. The barrels are matte black and appear to be constructed from metal, with visible barrel bands securing them together. The stock is minimal, resembling a pistol grip, and is made of dark, textured wood, providing a sturdy hold. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a simple, utilitarian design. The overall finish is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, making it suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments. The shotgun's robust construction and short length suggest it is designed for maneuverability and ease of handling.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short, dark wooden grip and matte black metal barrels. The design is utilitarian and robust, ideal for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the short barrels, dark wooden grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two parallel barrels and the muzzle openings, emphasizing the side-by-side configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other side of the barrels and grip with similar features.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the alignment of the barrels and the width of the grip, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, smooth contour and no additional reinforcement
